reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, the bathrooms are very clean and new, like all the YPF stations around here.

reviews.comment:
Sacas turno por la web para un servicio y cuando llegas te dicen que eso es ficción, que esperes tu turno porque es por orden de llegada. Desastre

(Translated by Google)
You book an appointment online for a service, and when you arrive they tell you it's all a lie, that you have to wait your turn because it's first-come, first-served. Disaster.

reviews.comment:
Primero lo mejor, los baños, limpios, ordenados, luminosos y modernos. El lugar para descanso, fogones. Muy buenos. Lo malo el precio del combustible, más caro. Lo peor, la atención del personal tanto en la playa como en el bar y también los precios del bar, carísimos. La verdad como socio del A.C.A. no recomiendo esta estación, si el lugar para descansar.

(Translated by Google)
First, the best part: the restrooms—clean, tidy, bright, and modern. The rest area, with its barbecue grills, is very good. The downside is the higher fuel price. The worst part is the staff's service, both on the beach and in the bar, and also the bar prices—exorbitant. Honestly, as an A.C.A. member, I don't recommend this station, though I do recommend the rest area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJbXZDV1pREAE

reviews.comment:
Vayas donde vayas, en cualquier situación, es un placer hacer una parada en las estaciones del ACA. Buena atención, buenos servicios (los baños estaban impecables) y empleados (todos) con amabilidad y afabilidad en la atención

(Translated by Google)
Wherever you go, in any situation, it's a pleasure to stop at an ACA station. Excellent service, excellent amenities (the restrooms were spotless), and all the staff were friendly and helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJc3VtUUxREAE

reviews.comment:
Mal servicio,mala atención,no disponian de aceites para motor,larga espera para cargar combustible.Muy raro por ser ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service, poor customer service, they didn't have engine oil, long wait to refuel. Very strange for an ACA station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJbFBtVkZREAE
